title: centaurea × beltranii
intro: Centaurea × beltranii, also known as Beltrán's cornflower, is a hybrid perennial plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is rich in medicinal properties, primarily due to its flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds, which have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Centaurea × beltranii include its potential in alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. Centaurea × beltranii is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and its extracts have also been used in herbal preparations, such as capsules and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
